name: Unit test
when_to_use: A unit test is failing, flaky, or surprising

name: Integration test
when_to_use: An integration test is failing or flaky

name: E2E/UI test
when_to_use: An end-to-end or UI test is failing or flaky

name: Exploratory session
when_to_use: A session went off the rails (charter unclear, notes unactionable, no usable findings)

name: Property test
when_to_use: A property-based test is failing or shrinking unexpectedly

name: Contract test
when_to_use: A consumer contract test is failing

name: Performance test
when_to_use: A performance test is failing or noisy

name: Mutation test
when_to_use: A mutation run is failing or a surviving mutant is unclear
